reviews.author: PAUL
reviews.text: Gutterbugs are simply the best. Gutters cleaned and emptied of rubbish by two of the nicest guys I know.

reply.text:
Hi Paul, thanks for the kind words! It was a pleasure helping you out yesterday. We’re glad you’re happy with the Gutterbugs service and it was great to see you.

All the best,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Lorraine G
reviews.text: Gutterbugs (Ryan & Richard) were efficient and professional from start to finish, providing a prompt quote and completing the work to a high standard. They removed our hedgehog gutter brushes, thoroughly cleaned the gutters, and, after discussing options with us, installed leaf guards on the downpipes instead of reinstating the hedgehogs. They left everything very clean and tidy. We’ll definitely use them again next year and highly recommend them.

reply.text:
Thanks for the lovely review Lorraine. We're glad we could be of help. 

Wishing you a lovely weekend. 

Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: stephen richards
reviews.text: Very good job and nice men.

reply.text:
Thanks Stephen, glad we could be of help.

Regards
Ryan

reviews.author: Ed Snow
reviews.text:
Excellent experience, polite and friendly team who did a great job.
Would definitely recommend.

reply.text:
Hi Ed, thanks for the kind words! We’re glad we could get the job done for you and that you were happy with the service. Thanks for choosing us!

All the best, Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Joanna Stone
reviews.text: Superb service. Very friendly and knowledgeable, incredibly helpful, efficient, good vfm. All round just a pleasure to work with. Will definitely have them back again next year.

reply.text:
Hi Joanna, 

Thanks for the glowing review! We’re so glad we could provide efficient service and good value. It was a pleasure working with you, and we’re already looking forward to your next cleaning. See you next year!

Regards,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Georgina Minter-Brown
reviews.text: Excellent service by two lovely people. Ryan and his team were quick to respond to messages, and were polite and professional. They did a brilliant job on our gutters, and we will be using them again next year! Thank you!

reply.text:
Hi Georgina, we really appreciate the review. It's good to hear you were happy with the job. My dad and I look forward to helping you out again next year!

Much appreciated.
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Andrew R
reviews.text: Professional and friendly service. My gutters are now cleared (even had a plant growing there!) Plus a new endcap was just a few extra quid, so no more overflowing water every time it rains!

reply.text:
Hi Andrew, thanks for the kind words! It was a pleasure helping you out. We’re glad we could get those gutters back in working order and fix that overflow issue for a fair price.

All the best,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Gio Z
reviews.text:
Highly recommended!

Friendly, honest and professional service. Helped us to get rid of pigeons nesting under solar panels.

reply.text: Hi Gio, thanks for the recommendation! Those nesting issues can be a real headache, so my dad and I are glad we could help get your solar panels cleared. See you next time!

reviews.author: Greig Peter
reviews.text: A pleasure to work with.

reply.text:
Hi Greig, thanks for leaving us a review! Glad you were happy with the service and it was great to meet you.

Cheers, Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Stefan Gyoker
reviews.text: The guys were absolutely brilliant from start to finish. Quick to quote, started the work on time and did a fantastic job. 30 years of dirt and moss removed and roof now looks like new. They take pride in their work, left the surrounding patio areas clean and tidy when they left and were just overall lovely guys. Thanks Ryan and Richard - highly recommended!

reply.text:
Hi Stefan, thanks for the kind words! It was a pleasure working on your home and getting that roof looking like new again. My dad and I take a lot of pride in the cleanup, so we appreciate you mentioning the patio. Hope you're enjoying the fresh look!

Regards,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: George Bull
reviews.text: Ryan and Richard were great. They came out at short notice to deal with a gutter problem. The problem is now fixed and their price is very fair. You can’t ask for more than that!

reply.text:
Hi George,

Thanks got leaving us a review, glad to hear the gutters are all fixed now and that you were happy with the service. 

All the best,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Gisella Goodwin
reviews.text: Excellent service

reply.text:
Hi Gisella, thanks for the feedback! It was a pleasure helping you out and we appreciate the 5 stars.

Cheers,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Phil Hill
reviews.text: Ryan and Richard are really friendly and professional,  they did a fantastic job of clearing and cleaning my blocked gutter over my conservatory at a very competitive price.

reply.text:
Hi Phil, thanks for leaving us a 5-star review! Glad you were happy with the job we did on the conservatory gutters. It was great meeting you and we appreciate the recommendation!

Regards
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Victoria Lang
reviews.text: From start to finish, Gutterbugs couldn’t have been more perfect! If you’re looking for a professional, knowledgeable, friendly, family run company to clean your gutters and roof, then look no further. Richard and Ryan are absolutely brilliant! They treated my property with respect and care and did a truly amazing job! I would definitely recommend them! A complete 5 star rating from me.

reply.text:
Hi Victoria, thanks for leaving such a nice review! We're glad we could get the gutters and roof sorted for you and that you were happy with the service. It was great meeting you and we appreciate the 5 stars!

Cheers,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Elizabeth Alder
reviews.text:
Ryan and Richard did a fantastic job clearing my gutters and roof of moss
The are both extremely pleasant, helpful and professional.
I’m delighted.

reply.text: Thank you for your wonderful feedback, Elizabeth! We're thrilled to hear that Ryan and Richard provided you with excellent service in clearing your gutters and roof. It's great to know that their pleasant and professional demeanor made a positive impression. We appreciate your support and look forward to assisting you again in the future!

reviews.author: Steve Odell
reviews.text: Used these guys to clean off a huge amount of moss from my roof. Also cleaned out the gutters. Very pleasant people, Had all the (what looked like) right equipment. Overall very satisfied and would recommend.

reply.text: Thank you for your positive feedback, Steve! We're thrilled to hear that you were satisfied with our roof and gutter cleaning services. Our team always strives to provide excellent service and the right equipment for each job. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to serving you again in the future!

reviews.author: Patrick Busby
reviews.text:
Great service and incredibly professional. Ryan was so helpful from the very first enquiry, all the way through until the job was completed. They carried out an absolutely fantastic job, did it with a smile on their faces and were super polite. All whilst being very competitive.
I couldn’t recommend them enough! Top marks from me

reply.text: Thank you for your wonderful review, Patrick! We're thrilled to hear that Ryan and the team provided you with great service and professionalism. Your kind words and recommendation mean a lot to us. We look forward to serving you again in the future!

reviews.author: Dorothy Gillingham
reviews.text:
You don’t always come across a company like Gutterbugs these days.  The work carried out was over and above all that was required.  To put into words, capable, dependable, reliable, polite and efficient.
Would highly recommend.

reply.text: Thank you for your wonderful review, Dorothy! We're delighted to hear that you had such a positive experience with our team. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to serving you again in the future!

reviews.author: Michael Vaux
reviews.text: I would recommend Gutterbugs to anyone. I don't normally write reviews but the job they did was fantastic. There was a small hiccup where one of our gutters was missed by mistake but they were back round to the house within 30 minutes to remedy the issue - very impressed with the customer service! I'll be using them again in the summer to remove our roof moss!

reply.text: Thank you for your wonderful review, Michael! We're delighted to hear that you were impressed with our customer service and that we could promptly resolve the issue. Your recommendation means a lot to us. We look forward to assisting you again in the summer with the roof moss removal!

reviews.author: Nicholas Thomas
reviews.text: Professional and friendly service from Ryan & Richard, very happy with job done

reply.text: Thank you for your wonderful feedback, Nicholas! We're thrilled to hear that you had a professional and friendly experience with Ryan and Richard. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we look forward to serving you again!

reviews.author: John
reviews.text: Excellent job done !

reply.text: Thank you for your great feedback, John! We're thrilled to hear that you're satisfied with our work. Your support means a lot to us!

reviews.author: Will Jameson
reviews.text: Ryan and Richard were great. Responded and got the work done quickly and were really practical and professional.

reply.text: Thank you for your wonderful review, Will! We're glad to hear that Ryan and Richard made a positive impression with their efficiency and professionalism. Your feedback means a lot to us, and we look forward to assisting you again in the future!

reviews.author: H C
reviews.text: Ryan is such a nice chap, he is reliable and turns up when he says he will, and does a great job at a reasonable price. Highly recommended.

reply.text:
Thanks for the review! My dad and I know how important it is to turn up when we say we will, so it’s great to hear you appreciated that. Glad you were happy with the work and the price!

Best, Ryan & Richard"

reviews.text: An excellent job. Richard and Ryan were competent, professional and careful, and I would have no hesitation in recommending them to any other household or business.

reply.text: Thank you for the kind words! It was a pleasure working for you. We take a lot of pride in doing a competent and thorough job, so it’s great to hear you were happy with the service.

reviews.author: Amelia Firth-Waugh
reviews.text: Ryan was incredibly professional, speedy and very well priced. We will be using his services again next year! Would definitely recommend! Thanks so much

reviews.text: Ryan & his dad are an amazing team. Did the work beyond of what was required of them. Very honest people, and ensured everything was transparent. Family/friends have already booked them in. 5* service.

reviews.text: Ryan and his Dad provide an excellent service at very reasonable cost. Apart from the fact that they are really nice guys, they have all the right kit and are very professional. To date they have cleared my gutters and cleaned off moss etc from my roof. A solid 5 stars.

reviews.text: I hired Gutterbugs through check-a-trade, which had many companies contact me to provide quotes. Not only did gutterbugs provide the most competitive quote but they were able to provide a date for the job for within a week of first contact. On the job they were thorough with the roof cleaning and the tidy up afterward, polite all the way and gave a great result. Would recommend.

reply.text:
Thank you for the great review Ross, we're happy to be of service. 

Regards,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.text: Very professional. Clean, tidy and thorough. Excellent communication. Would highly recommend this company.

reviews.text: Ryan and Richard, did a great job clearing the moss off our roof, which was a tricky job with some fragile tiles. They have some decent gear for the job, good knowledge, and would recommend to anyone who needs roof cleaning/maintenance work. Good value, and very professional. Wish them all the best.

reply.text:
Thanks for taking the time to leave us a review. We appreciate your feedback. We're glad to hear you were pleased with our moss clearing service, especially considering the delicate nature of your roof's tiles.

Wishing you all the best,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.text: Arrived promptly and fixed leaking gutter and cleaned gutter very reasonable cost

reviews.author: Rosalind Birkett
reviews.text:
We have had very positive experiences with Gutterbugs.
I had my roof and gutters mended and cleared of moss  about a year ago, and found Ryan and his team to be very professional, polite and helpful.
Just recently my neighbour and I needed the gutter cleared before the expected rainfall, and they came early the next morning and did a really good job.
I would thoroughly recommend them.

reply.text:

reviews.author: Jamie Jones
reviews.text: I messaged Gutterbugs at the weekend. They messaged back instantly & my gutters were cleaned first thing Monday morning. They were on time, thoughtful, professional and efficient and I would highly recommend them. I think I’ll be seeing them next year too!

reply.text: Thank you so much for the kind review!

reviews.author: John Jarvis
reviews.text: Richard and Ryan did an excellent job cleaning our roof and helping with some guttering problems. Two nice guys who are extremely efficient in their work. Their pricing is also very fair and I would fully recommend them.

reply.text:
Hi John,

Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a fantastic 5-star review.

We're committed to maintaining the quality you've come to expect from us and ensuring your satisfaction in the future. If you ever need our services again or have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out to us.

Thanks again for choosing Gutterbugs Exterior Cleaning, and we look forward to serving you in the future.

Best regards,
Ryan & Richard
Gutterbugs Exterior Cleaning

reviews.author: davy kwan
reviews.text:
Ryan and Richard did an excellent job. They have a sense of humour which is important as they were around the place for 2 day :-).  Conscientious and treat their work seriously which is refreshing.
They did our next door neighbours’ roof first and she was saying how good they were; I am not disappointed.  Most importantly the clearing out of the moss on the tiles were done manually and not by power jet which maybe quicker but I worry that it could  damage the tiles.  They also applied the chemical on the retaining wall too to see if it can remove the discolouring caused by black mould, without charging extra.  It is a job very well done indeed.   So pleased that I don’t have to go around picking up the moss or watching the water gushing down from the gutter. So thank you.

reply.text:
Hi Davy,

Thank you so much for the kind review. We’re glad you’re happy with our work. If you ever need anything please feel free to give us a shout.

Thanks!
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Megane Cutler
reviews.text: The Gutterbugs Team cleaned and repaired our gutters today and did an excellent job. Prompt, courteous, professional and efficient. No hidden cost and a very reasonable and affordable fee. We would absolutely recommend this small local company ☺️

reply.text:
Hi Meg, thank you so much for the kind review, we were happy to be of assistance. 

Regards
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Christopher Eyles
reviews.text: Excellent service. I can highly recommend Gutterbugs.

reply.text: Thanks Chris!

reviews.text: Gutterbugs are an excellent business! Requesting their service on their website was easy, they responded quickly with a competitive quote and were able to do the job within a few days. reviews.author: Susan Hinks
reviews.text: Superb gutter clearing service.  Ryan responded same day to an urgent call and completed a very professional job to a high standard, including a couple of guttering fixes, for a very fair price.  Highly recommend, I will use them again.

reviews.author: Kirk Hay
reviews.text: The Gutterbugs team did a great job on my roof and gutters. I had them scrape some moss from the roof and then it was given a spray that will eliminate the microbes and lichen and stop it growing back anytime soon. They also cleaned out the gutter thoroughly with a very fancy vacuum machine and I was amazed to see what they collected! They did such a careful job by hand and I was impressed by their attention to detail and careful steady progress over the day. A great father and son team too that were just a pleasure to meet. I was also pleased with the soffit and fascia cleaning that they did and they left the place very near and tidy. I’d recommend them and I’ll also be looking to get them back in a year or so to get those gutters cleaned out! Top marks.

reply.text:
Hi Kirk,

Thank you so much for the kind review, we really appreciate it! We're happy to have been of help. If you ever need help with anything else just give us a call

Regards,
Ryan & Richard

reviews.author: Mattie Fellows
reviews.text: Ryan was super friendly and came the next day. Can’t recommend enough :)

reply.text: Thanks for the kind review Mattie, pleasure doing business with you :)

reviews.author: Mac Maclean
reviews.text:
Excellent service,Ryan and Richard cleared the gutters on 6 homes in our little row of cottages.
Absolutely first class workmanship, very professional, had all the latest equipment.
It was a pleasure to meet such lovely ,friendly workmen, great attitude, couldn't recommend them more.
If you need this sort of work doing efficiently and with a smile then Gutterbugs is the answer.
Competitively priced, we are all delighted, thank you so much.
Best wishes.
"Mac" Maclean

reviews.text: We recently had gutters cleaned in our property. I would definitely recommend to my friends and family Ryan, who also gave a detailed status of all gutters and maintenance regime. I look forward to get more work done - roof top cleaning.

reviews.author: Michelle Boyes
reviews.text: Would highly recommend Gutterbugs. A lovely family run business, Richard and Ryan, was the most professional polite workman that I've ever met. They quoted within hours of contact, they turned up on time, did an amazing job, and left the premises clean and tidy. The price they quoted is what they invoiced. They even went the extra mile and repaired some guttering without charging extra. What more can you ask for . If you need work done on your gutters, soffits,  fascias etc, then look no further. You will not be disappointed.

reviews.text: Ryan came to clean the most from our roof and applied a treatment to prevent it from growing back. We were all impressed with the results and his tidy work. Would definitely recommend

reply.text: Thanks Hilary!

reviews.author: Rose Jefferies
reviews.text: Great service. Quick to respond and easy to book. Did a great job for a very reasonable price. Would definitely recommend!

reply.text: Thanks Rose!

reviews.author: Carol Spencer
reviews.text: Quick, efficient, polite and on time.

reply.text: Thanks Carol! Pleasure doing business with you.
Thanks Zoë! We hope you enjoy your new clean house! Let us know if you need help with anything else.

reviews.author: M H
reviews.text: Ryan was very professional and efficient. His working partner is his Dad both know what they are doing. Both work patiently and came well prepared. You rarely get good quality of work and value for money together. Fortunately, Gutterbugs provide you both. Keep up the good work guys. 🥇

reply.text: Thank you Hassan, it was a pleasure meeting and doing business with you. Wishing you well for the New Year.

reviews.author: Phoebe Barker
reviews.text: Brilliant job - Ryan was super friendly and did a thorough gutter clearance on my very old property. I thought the price was very reasonable too. Would highly recommend!

reply.text: Thanks Phoebe! Anytime, It was a pleasure doing business with you.
Thanks Kent!
